title: AN ACT MAKING THE SURIBAO RIVER THE BOUNDARY BETWEEN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BORONGAN AND MAYDOLONG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4015 / 56 OG No. 47, 7156 (November 21, 1960)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2676, June 18, 1960 ]

AN ACT MAKING THE SURIBAO RIVER THE BOUNDARY BETWEEN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BORONGAN AND MAYDOLONG, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Suribao River is hereby made the boundary between the municipalities of Borongan and Maydolong, Province of Samar.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 18, 1960.
